prompt: Create a reusable set of animated UI elements with motion and sound feedback that I can drop into an interface shell.
Build a lightweight melody composition module with a virtual keyboard, simple playback, and save-load for short songs.
Create a printable label maker for mixtapes, archival media cases, shelf tags, or gift playlists with title, creator, date, and template controls.
Build a browser for music-themed illustration assets that lets me preview, search, and export images for creative projects.
Create a branching narrative authoring tool where I can define scenes, choices, and conditional story paths.
Build a heraldic emblem composition tool where I can assemble shields, crests, mottos, and colors into finished designs.
I want help designing a professional physical presentation portfolio that I can assemble myself using bookbinding techniques.
Create a label design tool for archival cases, media boxes, and storage bins with print-ready layouts and custom text.
Build a single-page virtual piano chord playground with keyboard input, chord buttons, and local audio playback.
Create a local animation learning tool with working examples, inline explanations, and quick access to terminology.
Build an animation sandbox that demonstrates simple effects like fade, slide, rotate, and bounce with editable parameters.
Create a classroom drawing module with a canvas, simple tools, save-to-portfolio, and local gallery viewing.
Build a local melody clip editor where I can create short MIDI phrases, transform them, organize them, and export them.
Create a local music visualizer that renders animated visuals synchronized to audio playback.
Design a hotspot-based scene explorer where users click visual elements to travel between whimsical locations.
Build a marble texture generator with adjustable color, vein patterns, scale, and export for design use.
Create an interface-asset browser for icons and micro-animations with preview and export in common design formats.
Build an animated button component with tunable motion variants and a small playground to preview the effect.
Create a tool that lets me draw or edit smooth animation paths for UI elements without hand-coding coordinates.
Build a film script beat board with draggable story cards across three act columns.
Create a local desktop app for generating and printing labels for physical media cases, archival boxes, or personal collections.
Build an in-canvas move-and-resize module for visual layouts with drag gestures, handles, and modifier-key behavior.
Create an interactive local map with clickable hotspots, a detail panel, and simple pan and zoom controls.
Build a local font browser that previews installed fonts as cards with custom sample text and metadata.
Create a floating media preview inspector where I can place, size, and configure embedded video, audio, or motion assets inside a design workflow.
Build an animation control panel with duration, easing, delay, and preview controls for a single motion effect.
Create an asset preview card for icons, illustrations, or clips with thumbnail, tags, format, and export actions.
Build a hotspot editor where I place clickable regions on an image, label them, and link each region to a destination scene.
Create a story beat card with title, act, summary, characters involved, and drag-ready status for a script board.
Build a font sample tile with custom text, weight preview, foundry metadata, and quick favorite actions.
